message:
feat(output): Add builders module for common rich output patterns

Adds convenience builder functions for creating rich terminal output:

Search Results:
- search_results_table() - Display search results in a table
- search_results_table_with_id() - Search results with skill IDs

Skill Display:
- skill_panel() - Bordered panel with skill info
- skill_detail_panel() - Full skill content panel

Status Display:
- CheckStatus enum with Ok/Warning/Error/Skipped/InProgress
- CheckResult struct for hierarchical status
- status_tree() - Display status checks in a tree
- status_tree_with_title() - Status tree with custom root

Error/Success Panels:
- error_panel() - Red-bordered error panel
- error_panel_with_hint() - Error panel with suggestion
- warning_panel() - Yellow-bordered warning panel
- success_panel() - Green-bordered success panel

Progress:
- progress_line() - Progress bar with percentage
- quality_bar() - Colored quality indicator

Lists:
- bulleted_list() - Unicode bullet points
- numbered_list() - Numbered items
- key_value_table() - Two-column key-value table

All builders have plain-text variants for non-terminal output.

Closes: bd-2rn1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
